content:
Should you get gDoll if you are a new player?

https://youtu.be/o-q_W7hT48w

embeds.title: GDoll Should you Pull?
embeds.description:
Lots of mixed opinions on this unit out there. This video goes into more details and you decide if you want her.

If you are an Ultra main - she is a must pull. If you are not an Ultra main, you might think highly about her.
